rationale: Review 1's finding that ReductiveGroup and SemisimpleGroup carry only vacuous `True` fields (confirmed directly in lines 62-70 of the diff) is the decisive issue: acting on Review 2 leaves these classes mathematically empty while acting on Review 1 forces them to actually encode the conditions they claim to. Review 2's findings (over-strong context, redundant instance) are real but leave the fundamental design flaw untouched.
